scripts.setup: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --quiet --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install --quiet -r requirements.txt && { [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; } && { [ -d wave-mobile ] && npm --prefix wave-mobile install || echo 'wave-mobile not present in this workspace, skipping mobile setup'; }
